title: Edge of Seventeen
why_this_song: Edge of Seventeen by Stevie Nicks (1981) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 13 times; first heard in: "Just like the white winged dove"

Appears 13 times; first heard in: "Just like the white winged dove"
Appears 13 times; first heard in: "Sings a song, sounds like she's singing"
Appears 13 times; first heard in: "Ooh, baby, ooh"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "white" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "white" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "winged" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "winged" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Just like the white winged dove
Yeah, yeah, yeah, well the music there

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Sings a song, sounds like she's singing
The clouds never expect it when it rains

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Stevie Nicks one question about "Edge of Seventeen", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Stevie Nicks sobre "Edge of Seventeen", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Edge of Seventeen" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Edge of Seventeen" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Edge of Seventeen" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Edge of Seventeen" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
